_description: All environment variables used in the Proximity codebase. Update ENV_VAR_META in generate-knowledge.mjs when adding new vars.
note: public=true means safe to expose to the browser (NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix). required=true means the app won't function without it.

envVars.name: AIRTABLE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Airtable API token — used by data import scripts

envVars.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
envVars.description: Cloudflare account ID for R2 storage access

envVars.name: DEV_SUPABASE_DEFAULT_KEY
envVars.description: Supabase anon/public key for development

envVars.name: DEV_SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
envVars.description: Supabase service role key for development (bypasses RLS)

envVars.name: DEV_SUPABASE_URL
envVars.description: Supabase project URL for development environment

envVars.name: EMAIL_HOST
envVars.description: SMTP host for Nodemailer email sending

envVars.name: EMAIL_PASS
envVars.description: SMTP password for Nodemailer authentication

envVars.name: EMAIL_PORT
envVars.description: SMTP port for Nodemailer

envVars.name: EMAIL_USER
envVars.description: SMTP username for Nodemailer authentication

envVars.name: GOOGLE_ID
envVars.description: Google OAuth client ID for NextAuth

envVars.name: GOOGLE_SECRET
envVars.description: Google OAuth client secret for NextAuth

envVars.name: IMPORT_SECRET
envVars.description: Shared secret to allow /api/addListing without session auth (import scripts)

envVars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_CONCIERGE_URL
envVars.description: Formspree endpoint for the matchmaking concierge form

envVars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_FORMSPREE_EXIT_POLL_URL
envVars.description: Formspree endpoint for the exit poll form

envVars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_TOKEN
envVars.description: Mapbox GL public token — safe to expose to browser

envVars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_RAPIDAPI_KEY
envVars.description: RapidAPI key for external API services

envVars.name: NODE_ENV
envVars.description: Deployment environment (development | production)

envVars.name: PROD_SUPABASE_DEFAULT_KEY
envVars.description: Supabase anon/public key for production

envVars.name: PROD_SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
envVars.description: Supabase service role key for production (bypasses RLS)

envVars.name: PROD_SUPABASE_URL
envVars.description: Supabase project URL for production environment

envVars.name: R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID
envVars.description: Cloudflare R2 API access key ID

envVars.name: R2_BUCKET_NAME
envVars.description: Cloudflare R2 bucket name (dev)

envVars.name: R2_BUCKET_NAME_PROD
envVars.description: Cloudflare R2 bucket name (production)

envVars.name: R2_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
envVars.description: Public base URL for R2 objects (dev)

envVars.name: R2_PUBLIC_BASE_URL_
envVars.description: No description — add entry to ENV_VAR_META in generate-knowledge.mjs

envVars.name: R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
envVars.description: Cloudflare R2 API secret access key

envVars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
envVars.description: Resend email service API key — present but currently unused

envVars.name: WEBHOOK_SECRET
envVars.description: Shared secret for verifying incoming webhooks
